reasoning: This sequence will depict a somber, respectful gesture appropriate for a funeral urn. The robot will hold its arms slightly away from the body, palms up, as if presenting or carefully holding the urn.  The movement will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing reverence.  The starting position will be a slight outward rotation from the body with the arms slightly lowered.  The second frame will show a slight upward movement, and the third frame will be at the peak of the gesture, before returning to the starting position in the fourth frame.  The arms will remain relatively still throughout, conveying a sense of solemnity.
